The Intelligent Way to Pay for Vet Care

How Scratchpay Works

Veterinary financing built for how emergencies actually work — fast, transparent, and designed around your budget, not a credit committee.

01

See your plan options in 60 seconds

Enter a few basic details and Scratchpay's proprietary technology returns your available payment plan options in under a minute — using a soft inquiry that never touches your credit score.

02

Compare plans — pick what fits your budget

Review your plan options side by side. See the monthly payment, total cost, and APR for each before you choose. Including 0% APR promotional options for qualified applicants.

03

Confirm at the clinic — paperless

Scratchpay integrates directly with your veterinary practice's system. No printing, no branch visits. Confirm your plan digitally from any device — at the clinic or from the waiting room.

04

Direct your attention back to your pet

The financial decision is made. You know the amount, the term, and the monthly payment. It becomes a fixed line in your budget — and your pet gets the care they need, today.

See your plan options before you commit to anything

Takes 60 seconds. Soft inquiry only — zero impact to your credit score.

Start My 60-Second Check — It's Free

Transparent Pricing

Representative APR
Comparison Table

Our rates are determined by your credit profile and loan details. The table shows representative rates across all credit tiers — no hidden costs, ever.

Fixed rate for the entire loan duration
No prepayment penalties — pay off early for free
No origination fee on qualifying loans
Rate lock from application to funding

Representative APR 5.99%–34.99%. The Representative APR is based on a loan of $5,000 over 60 months. Not all applicants will receive the representative rate; your actual rate depends on individual circumstances.

Credit Score APR Range Total Cost
Excellent
750+ 5.99–9.99% $5,810
Good
700–749 10.99–14.99% $6,514
Fair
660–699 15.99–19.99% $7,290
Average
620–659 20.99–24.99% $8,066
Poor
560–619 25.99–34.99% $9,124

Example based on $5,000 loan over 60 months. Representative APR 5.99%. Total amount repayable varies by rate.

Your Credit Score Is Safe Here

Bank-Grade Encryption. Vet-Grade Speed.

Checking your plan options uses a soft inquiry only — zero impact, zero reporting. Your personal and financial data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

BBB Accredited
A+ Rating
256-bit SSL
Bank-level encryption
GLBA Compliant
Financial privacy standards met
NMLS Licensed
Registered #123456
TILA Disclosure
Full loan cost shown before signing
Soft Inquiry Only
Plan check never affects your score

No Application Fees. No Hidden Costs. Your Data Never Sold.

Every rate, term, and payment amount is shown in full before you confirm anything. Your information is collected only to process your plan check — encrypted via TLS 1.3 in transit, encrypted at rest, and never sold to advertisers or unaffiliated third parties. You may request deletion at any time.

Check My Rate — Soft Inquiry Only

Do You Qualify?

Plan Eligibility

Scratchpay serves a broad range of credit profiles. If you have consistent income and a bank account, checking your plan options takes 60 seconds and never affects your score.

60-Second Self-Check

18 years of age or older
U.S. citizen or permanent resident
Consistent, documentable income
Open checking or savings account

Tick all four and you meet the baseline criteria. Your available plan options and rate depend on your credit profile and the plan amount selected. Checking takes 60 seconds and uses a soft inquiry only.

View Payment Plans for My Pet's Care
01

Age 18 or older

You must be a legal adult to enter into a payment plan agreement in any U.S. state.

02

U.S. Residency

Must be a U.S. citizen or permanent resident with a valid Social Security Number.

03

Verifiable Income

Regular income from employment, self-employment, pension, disability, or other documented sources.

04

Active Bank Account

A checking or savings account at a U.S. bank or credit union for payment processing.

05

Diverse Credit Profiles Welcome

Scratchpay evaluates a range of credit histories. Your score is one factor — income and overall profile also matter.

06

Reachable Contact Info

A working email address and phone number for identity verification and plan confirmation.

Vet Financing — Plain Answers

Frequently Asked Questions

Straight answers to the questions pet owners ask most before checking their plan options. If something is not covered here, our team is available by phone.

Still have questions?

1-800-SCRATCH · Mon–Fri 8am–8pm EST

No. Scratchpay's plan check uses a soft inquiry only. Soft inquiries are not reported to credit bureaus as applications and leave no mark on your score. You can see all available payment plan options without any credit impact whatsoever.
Certain Scratchpay plans carry a 0% promotional APR, meaning you repay only the amount financed — no interest, no financing fees. Eligibility depends on your credit profile and the plan term selected. All available plans, including their APR, are shown to you in full before you confirm anything. If a 0% plan is available to you, you will see it in your results.
Scratchpay is designed specifically for veterinary care. This includes emergency treatment, diagnostics, surgery, dental procedures, specialist consultations, cancer treatment, orthopedic care, and other services performed at a licensed veterinary practice in Scratchpay's partner network.
Plan checks return results in 60 seconds. Confirmation is completed at the clinic using Scratchpay's integrated system — no printing or paperwork required. Your veterinary practice can proceed with treatment as soon as your plan is confirmed.
Scratchpay evaluates a range of credit profiles, including applicants with limited or imperfect credit history. Your credit score is one factor — income and overall financial picture also inform the plans you are offered. Checking your options takes 60 seconds and never affects your score.
Plan APRs available through Scratchpay range from 5.99% to 34.99%. The specific rate on any plan is fixed and disclosed in full before you confirm. It does not change after you sign. Plans are structured so your monthly payment amount stays the same for the entire term.
Scratchpay does not charge application fees. Any applicable plan fees are disclosed clearly before you confirm your selection — there are no post-acceptance surprises. The total amount you will repay is always shown upfront.
Yes. There are no prepayment penalties. Paying off your balance early reduces the total interest owed because interest accrues only on the remaining principal. You can pay ahead or pay in full at any time.
Scratchpay works with over 28,000 veterinary practices across the United States. If your current clinic is not yet a partner, you can contact Scratchpay directly or ask your clinic to apply — enrollment is free for practices. You can also search for Scratchpay partner clinics near you on the Scratchpay website.
A credit card carries an open-ended revolving balance at a variable rate — the average APR for new accounts exceeds 27%. Scratchpay offers fixed-term payment plans with a set monthly payment, a disclosed total cost, and 0% APR options. You know exactly what you will pay before you commit, and the cost does not change while you repay.

Say Yes to Treatment Today.

View Your Payment Plan Options — It Takes 60 Seconds

No hard credit inquiry. No application fees. Every rate, term, and monthly payment shown in full before you confirm anything.

Get My Financing Options
Soft inquiry only — score unaffected
0% APR options for qualified applicants
Fixed payment amount for every month
Pay off early at no additional cost

Important Regulatory Disclosures

Loan Terms & Amounts: Loan amounts range from $200 to $5000. Minimum repayment term: 61 days. Maximum repayment term: 60 months (5 years). All loan products offered through this platform require repayment in full in 61 days or longer.

Maximum APR: The maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for payment plans available through this platform is 34.99%. APR is calculated in accordance with the Truth in Lending Act (TILA), 12 CFR Part 1026, and includes the interest rate plus all applicable fees. Minimum APR: 5.99%.

Representative Example: A care plan of $2,400 repaid over 12 months at a fixed APR of 0% results in 12 equal monthly payments of $200.00. Total amount repayable: $2,400.00. Total interest: $0.00. For plans outside the 0% promotional window: a plan of $2,400 repaid over 18 months at 14.99% APR results in 18 monthly payments of $148.17. Total amount repayable: $2,667.06. Your actual rate depends on credit profile, plan amount, and term selected. Not all applicants will qualify for 0% APR promotional plans.

No Guarantee of Approval: Submitting an inquiry or application does not guarantee loan approval or a specific loan offer. All applications are subject to credit review, identity verification, income verification, and lender underwriting criteria. Approval and final loan terms are at the sole discretion of the participating lender.

Credit Inquiry: Checking your rate uses a soft credit pull and will not affect your credit score. Proceeding with a full loan application may result in a hard credit inquiry, which may temporarily affect your credit score. State availability, loan terms, rates, and fees vary by lender and are subject to change without notice. Not available in all states.

Platform Disclosure: Scratchpay is a veterinary payment plan platform. Scratchpay facilitates payment plan options for veterinary care in partnership with licensed financial institutions. Scratchpay does not guarantee approval or specific plan terms, and plan availability may vary by state. Scratchpay may receive compensation in connection with plan originations, which does not influence the plan terms offered to you. Please review all plan terms, rates, and fees carefully before confirming any payment plan.

Risk Warning: Borrowing money involves financial risk. Failure to repay a loan on time may result in additional fees, negative credit reporting, and collections activity. Only borrow what you can comfortably repay. If you are experiencing financial difficulty, consider contacting a nonprofit credit counseling agency such as the NFCC (nfcc.org) for free guidance.

TCPA Notice: By submitting an inquiry, you consent to receive informational and account-related calls, emails, and SMS/text messages from Scratchpay and its partners at the phone number and email address provided. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency varies. Reply STOP to opt out of text messages at any time. Reply HELP for help. Consent to receive marketing communications is not a condition of obtaining financing. See our for full details.
